name: The Exiled Dead
inspire:
Friendly minions ({icon:minion}) begin the game Inspired.
After an enemy fighter is slain by a friendly minion ({icon:minion}), Inspire Deintalos and Marcov.

abilities.name: Dynamic Enhancer
abilities.rulesText: Friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighters have +X Move, where X is the number of slain friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighters.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.rulesText: Friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighters cannot hold treasure tokens or Delve. Friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighters' melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have Grievous ({icon:grievous}) if the target has any Stagger tokens.

abilities.name: Dynamic Surge
abilities.rulesText: You can re-roll 1 Attack dice in an Attack roll for a friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighter while any other friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighters are adjacent to the attacker.

abilities.name: Puppeteer
abilities.flavorText: Prentice Marcov is not yet the equal of his master's necromantic power, but he is certainly working to develop his dark skills.
abilities.rulesText:
Pick a friendly Marcov to use this ability if they have no Move or Charge tokens. Pick 1 of the following:

• That fighter and a friendly Regulus can each use a Core ability that they are eligible to use.

• If a friendly Regulus is slain, Raise them and place them in an empty hex adjacent to that fighter.

This ability can only be used once per battle round.

abilities.name: Danse Dynamic
abilities.flavorText: Deintalos is a master of the Force Dynamic, sending its crackling power through unliving limbs with ease.
abilities.rulesText:
Pick your leader ({icon:leader}) to use this ability if they have no Move or Charge tokens. Pick either the Move ability or the Attack ability. Each friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighter can use that ability.

Then, you can pick a slain friendly conductive ({icon:minion}) fighter. Raise that conductive ({icon:minion}) fighter, place them in an empty hex adjacent to your leader ({icon:leader}) and then inflict 1 damage on them.
